zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Grenville II於大約1453年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Grenville11451歲，母親Elizabeth Gorges20歲。他於大約1469年與Isabella Gilbert結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年3月18日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文托利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Grenville II于大约1453年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Grenville11451岁，母亲Elizabeth Gorges20岁。他于大约1469年与Isabella Gilbert结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1513年3月18日在英国英格兰可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文托利其。

nameMeanings.name: Grenville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Grainville-la-Teinturière in Seine-Maritime, France.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Grenville II was born about 1453, in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Grenville, was 11451 and his mother, Elizabeth Gorges, was 20. He married Isabella Gilbert about 1469. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 18 March 1513, in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Torridge, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Grenville II est né environ 1453, à Kilkhampton, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Grenville, avait 11451 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Gorges, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Gilbert environ 1469. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 18 mars 1513, à Kilkhampton, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Torridge, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Grenville II um 1453 in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Grenville 11451 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Gorges 20. Er hat um 1469 Isabella Gilbert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 18. März 1513 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Torridge, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Grenville II è nato il circa 1453 nel Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Grenville, aveva 11451 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Gorges, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Gilbert circa 1469. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 18 marzo 1513, nel Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Torridge, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Grenville IIが約1453年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルキルクハンプトンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Grenvilleは11451歳，母Elizabeth Gorgesは20歳であった。約1469年にIsabella Gilbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年3月18日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルキルクハンプトンで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボントリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Grenville II(이)가 대략 1453년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 킬카프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Grenville(은)는 11451세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Gorges(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1469년 Isabella Gilbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 3월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 킬카프턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 토리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Grenville II nasceu aproximadamente 1453, em Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Grenville, tinha 11451 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Gorges, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Gilbert aproximadamente 1469. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de março de 1513, em Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Torridge, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Grenville II родился около 1453 г. в местности килхамптон, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Grenville было 11451 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Gorges, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Gilbert около 1469 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 18 марта 1513 г. в местности килхамптон, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности торридж, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Grenville II nació aproximadamente 1453, en Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Grenville, tenía 11451 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Gorges, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Isabella Gilbert aproximadamente 1469. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1513, en Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Torridge, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
